meta.homeDescription: Prioritized pilots, production-grade builds, and integration into the systems you already use-so automation stays practical and owned after go-live.
meta.keywords: AI consulting, workflow automation, AI implementation, machine learning, operations

hero.subtitle: We tie strategy and delivery to the software you run today - CRM, shops, line-of-business tools, so wins are measurable and teams still know what the system did.

services.label: Our Services
services.intro: We start with what is realistic in your stack, run tight pilots, then integrate and measure-so you get momentum before you bet the roadmap.
services.outro: Tell us where the work piles up-we will help you scope a first win.

strategy.title: Discovery & roadmap
strategy.description: Prioritized use cases, boundaries, and owners-so you know what to pilot first and what “done” means.

development.title: Pilot & build
development.description: A scoped build that proves value in your real data and tools before you scale spend or headcount.

integration.title: Rollout & integration
integration.description: Production cutover into your systems and workflows-security, handoffs, and training included.

optimization.title: Measure & iterate
optimization.description: KPIs, ownership, and a feedback loop so automation keeps paying off after go-live.

solutions.label: Our Solutions
solutions.outro: Want to see where this fits your industry?
solutions.schemaName: AI agents for SEO, social, operations, and commerce
solutions.schemaDescription: Agent-style automation for content, social, internal workflows, commerce, and custom integrations.

about.visionLead: We want teams to spend their time on decisions only humans should make - not on copy-paste between tools.
about.missionLead: We help you pick a first win, ship it in production, and keep automation explainable for leadership and day-to-day ops.
about.approachLead: Two founders: product and AI on one side, delivery and systems on the other-so strategy does not evaporate after the workshop.

contact.label: Contact
contact.intro: Tell us where work piles up and what systems are in play-we will reply with concrete next steps, not a generic deck.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Thank you! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

team.title: The team
team.intro: LOTRINO is a focused AI practice: two founders who bridge strategy, technical consulting, and delivery - so your automation stays practical, explainable, and built to last.
team.janBio: Former EY, with long experience in technical consulting across complex client environments. He sets product direction and makes AI legible for leadership teams -while advancing his expertise through AI studies at Johannes Kepler University Linz.
team.mattisBio: Mattis analyzed, modeled, and optimized processes before AI automation was a buzzword. His business informatics studies and consulting experience at Senacor taught him one thing: the best solution is the one nobody notices anymore because it just works.
team.janAlt: Portrait of Jan Bocchino, co-founder of LOTRINO.
team.mattisAlt: Portrait of Mattis Scherbacher, co-founder of LOTRINO, at an outdoor cafe.

useCasesPage.title: Use Cases
useCasesPage.description: Industry-specific use cases: recruiting, logistics, healthcare, law firms, facility management - and what can realistically be automated.
useCasesPage.heading: Use Cases
useCasesPage.intro: Where repetitive work piles up most - and automation and AI levers that are realistic. Choose an industry for details.
useCasesPage.introLead: We connect AI strategy and hands-on implementation to operational reality - where repetitive work hides in ATS, WMS, practice software, law firm systems, and CAFM tools.
useCasesPage.introRich: Deep dives by sector: <recruiting>recruiting & applicant tracking workflows</recruiting>, <logistics>warehouse operations & supply chain</logistics>, <healthcare>medical practice administration & EHR</healthcare>, <legal>law firm intake & billing</legal>, and <facility>facility management & work orders</facility>.

useCasesPage.metaDescription: AI consulting for real operations: recruiting & ATS, logistics & WMS, medical practice admin, legal operations, and facility management - realistic automation levers.
